patch.after: Drop the editorial byline and write in first person from someone who actually organized an Oahu trip with friends.
patch.rationale: Humanization axis "Specific human voice" scored 4/10: Reads like a committee-produced SEO template with editorial byline and formulaic structure.

instructions.evidence: Genuine opinions 6/10 — Has a few real takes (Duke's is touristy but worth it, Pig and the Lady non-negotiable) but mostly safe recommendations.
Unexpected phrasings 5/10 — Some decent phrases ('who's on aux', 'war zone') but mostly predictable travel-blog cadence.

patch.target: This guide gives you a near-bulletproof 7-day Oahu itinerary, using only proven group-friendly spots, so the only thing left undecided is who’s on aux.
patch.before: This guide gives you a near-bulletproof 7-day Oahu itinerary, using only proven group-friendly spots, so the only thing left undecided is who’s on aux.
patch.after: Here's a 7-day plan that survived my group of six—the only thing it won't settle is who controls the aux cord.
patch.rationale: Humanization axis "Unexpected phrasings" scored 5/10: Some decent phrases ('who's on aux', 'war zone') but mostly predictable travel-blog cadence.

instructions.evidence: Point of view 6/10 — Has POV in spots but frequently devolves into surveying all options equally.

patch.target: September and October are warm and quieter; November–March is best for group surf-watching on the North Shore (big swells), but you’ll get showers near Waikiki.
patch.before: September and October are warm and quieter; November–March is best for group surf-watching on the North Shore (big swells), but you’ll get showers near Waikiki.
patch.after: Go in May. September works too, but May hits the sweet spot of dry weather and open reservation slots.
patch.rationale: Humanization axis "Point of view" scored 6/10: Has POV in spots but frequently devolves into surveying all options equally.

instructions.evidence: Quotable sentence 5/10 — 'Not all Oahu itineraries survive the group chat' is quotable, but most sentences are utilitarian.
Intro earns attention 5/10 — Buried under duplicated title, metadata, and TL;DR before the actual hook lands.

patch.target: Blog Trip Planning 7-Day Oahu Group Trip Itinerary: What Actually Works for Friend Groups Trip Planning 7-Day Oahu Group Trip Itinerary: What Actually Works for Friend Groups Last updated: April 23, 2026 TL;DR: A bulletproof 7-day Oahu group trip itinerary prioritizes accessible, proven spots like Hanauma Bay and Diamond Head while building in downtime to prevent group chat friction.
patch.before: Blog Trip Planning 7-Day Oahu Group Trip Itinerary: What Actually Works for Friend Groups Trip Planning 7-Day Oahu Group Trip Itinerary: What Actually Works for Friend Groups Last updated: April 23, 2026 TL;DR: A bulletproof 7-day Oahu group trip itinerary prioritizes accessible, proven spots like Hanauma Bay and Diamond Head while building in downtime to prevent group chat friction.
patch.after: Not all Oahu itineraries survive the group chat. Here's the 7-day plan I used to get five indecisive friends past Hanauma Bay reservations and onto the beach.
patch.rationale: Humanization axis "Intro earns attention" scored 5/10: Buried under duplicated title, metadata, and TL;DR before the actual hook lands.

The TL;DR is close but splits across two sentences and omits Days 3–7 entirely.
